title: I built a trading journal for forex, gold, and indices traders — looking for honest feedback
author: TraditionalBird8320

comments.author: Patient_Kangaroo4864
comments.body: Hard to give feedback without screenshots or a demo; journals live or die on low friction, flexible stats, and easy data export. If it’s mostly CRUD plus charts, that space is already crowded.

replies.author: TraditionalBird8320
replies.body:
That’s fair feedback.

You’re right — I need to show the product better with screenshots and a quick demo instead of just dropping the link.

My goal isn’t to make it just CRUD + charts. I’m trying to make the review flow faster and more useful around psychology, screenshots, setup tracking, and post-trade analysis.

Low friction is definitely something I’m focusing on. Appreciate the honest take.
